_doc: Single source of truth for the Agentic Energy Modeller demo: which buildings + cities the user can pick, and the deterministic facts attached to each. Backend (api/main.py) resolves a (building_key, city_key) pair to an IDF + EPW + state + carbon factor from THIS file. The frontend mirror lives at frontend/lib/energy-modeller-catalog.ts and MUST stay in sync. Floor areas are the DOE prototype NOMINAL gross floor area for display; the retriever still reads the AUTHORITATIVE area from the IDF at run time. NCC zones and grid factors are deterministic lookups, never LLM-authored.

buildings.label: Medium Office
buildings.blurb: DOE Commercial Reference Medium Office — 3 storeys, ~4,982 m². Mandatory-disclosure size band; has a real CBD whole-building office cohort in every city.
buildings.source: DOE Commercial Reference Buildings (energy.gov) — geometry reused with Australian weather.
